creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
I found a patch from DragonFly & NetBSD for mathutil.hxx, by which this 
port can be build with the systems compiler instead of lang/gcc. This 
prevents other ports like math/saga from subsequent build problems.

The enhancement of CMakeLists.txt remains, so one could also build the 
port with lang/gcc.

The following patch should be the last one to initiate this version of 
vigra. Contrary to my expectations the update process had been more 
complex than I expected.
